title: pavonia sepium
intro: Pavonia sepium, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a perennial plant belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Pavonia sepium include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its extracts have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat wounds, coughs, and skin conditions.
